title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Valley Stream, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Valley Stream, Long Island. Humane bat control, attic cleanup, and guaranteed exclusion. Call today for a free inspection!
intro: Valley Stream homeowners facing bat infestations need fast, humane, and effective solutions. Our professional bat removal and exclusion services protect your home from these nocturnal invaders while ensuring compliance with New York wildlife protection laws. We specialize in safe bat extraction, thorough attic decontamination, and permanent exclusion barriers for Long Island properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bat control expertise to Valley Stream, combining humane wildlife management with cutting-edge exclusion technology. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island homes and provide guaranteed, warrantied work with transparent pricing and same-day emergency response.
localContext: Valley Stream's mix of Tudor-style homes, Cape Cods, and multi-family residences near Green Acres Mall and Valley Stream State Park often attract bats seeking attic roosts. The area's mature trees and proximity to waterways create ideal bat habitats, making professional exclusion essential for protecting your property value and family health.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Valley Stream?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Valley Stream typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on colony size, entry points, attic damage, and the complexity of your home's architecture. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, but it must be done humanely and during specific times of the year. New York prohibits bat exclusion during maternity season (May 1 – July 31) when flightless pups are present. Our licensed professionals follow all state and federal regulations to ensure legal, ethical bat removal.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Valley Stream home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near rooflines or vents, small droppings in attics or on walls, and seeing bats emerge from your home at sunset. Our technicians can conduct a thorough inspection to confirm bat activity and identify all entry points.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a detailed inspection, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup and decontamination, and insulation replacement if needed. We guarantee our exclusion work and provide ongoing monitoring to ensure bats don't return.
